notes: Native database automations remain UI-driven, so the repo stores desired state and audit posture.
Phase 4 automations are notification-only and explicitly non-canonical.
No automation may mutate derived PM fields, recommendation fields, or execution state.

automations.name: Project Review Reminder
automations.triggerSummary: Notify when Next Review Date is due or overdue for Local Portfolio Projects.
allowedActions: Point the owner at the relevant filtered view

automations.name: Decision Revisit Reminder
automations.triggerSummary: Notify when Revisit By is approaching for Project Decisions.
allowedActions: Link the owner back to the open decision record

automations.name: Weekly Run Review Reminder
automations.triggerSummary: Notify when a Weekly Portfolio recommendation run is still Draft.
allowedActions: Point the reviewer at the draft recommendation run
